name: os-symmetry-synchronization
description: Operating system synchronization modeled using permutation groups, with scheduling in Sn, mutual exclusion as stabilizers, and round-robin fairness as cyclic actions, verified in Python.

name: network-queue-control
description: A variational approach to network queue control showing that constant-rate packet injection minimizes delay and queue growth under convex cost models, linking calculus of variations with OS networking.

name: energy-optimal-cpu-scheduler
description: An educational exploration of energy-aware CPU scheduling, studying how execution timing can minimize power for fixed workloads and illustrating DVFS and performance–power trade-offs in modern processors.
